module.name: shape
module.description: A geometric shape (rectangle, triangle, ellipse, diamond, pentagon, hexagon, star) with fill, border and centred text. Move / resize / rotate it on the preview in Edit layout.
module.aiSpec:
Use to draw a labelled geometric shape (callout box, badge, diagram node) placed on a slide. The shape fills its box and is positioned/sized via x/y/w/h args (percent of the slide, center origin) which you set by dragging in Edit layout. Block module: the body is the centred label text (Markdown), and may be empty for a blank shape.
Parameters: `type` — rectangle | triangle | ellipse | diamond | pentagon | hexagon | star (default rectangle). `fill` — fill colour (default theme accent); use "transparent" for outline-only. `opacity` — 0–1 fill opacity (default 1). `borderwidth` — border thickness in px (default 0 = none). `bordercolor` — border colour (default theme border). `textcolor` — label colour (default #ffffff). `fontsize` — CSS size of the label, e.g. 1.2em or 18px (default 1em). `radius` — corner radius 0–50 for the RECTANGLE only (default 0 = sharp corners). `halign` — left | center | right (default center): horizontal text alignment. `valign` — top | middle | bottom (default middle): vertical text alignment. `shadow` — true | false (default false): soft drop shadow under the shape.
Example: <!-- @shape type: rectangle, fill: #3b82f6, radius: 12, shadow: true, x: 50, y: 40, w: 30, h: 16 --> **Decision** <!-- @end -->

param.name: borderwidth
param.label: Border width (px)
param.desc: Border thickness in px; 0 = no border.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius
param.desc: Rounded corners for the rectangle only; 0 = sharp.

param.name: shadow
param.label: Drop shadow
param.desc: Soft drop shadow under the shape.

snippet.label: Shape (star)
snippet.text: <!-- @shape type: star, fill: var(--accent-color), x: 50, y: 40, w: 18, h: 24 --> <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Shape (labelled box)
snippet.text: <!-- @shape type: rectangle, fill: #3b82f6, radius: 12, x: 50, y: 40, w: 30, h: 16 --> **Label** <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A rounded rectangle with centred text. Move/resize in Edit layout.
